purpose: Ground truth labels for F2 RAGAS evaluation. Each entry defines what a CORRECT summary must contain. Used by the RAGAS eval harness in Week 3 to measure faithfulness and answer relevance.
labeling_method: Hand-labeled by reading actual document content from DB. NOT generated by LLM.

ragas_passing_threshold.note: Week 3 target 0.75 faithfulness, Day 45 final target 0.85

field_definitions.doc_id: UUID from regulatorydocument table (first 8 chars shown for readability)
field_definitions.expected_effective_date: YYYY-MM-DD or null — the correct date, hand-verified
field_definitions.expected_institution_types: List of institution types that MUST be mentioned
field_definitions.key_facts: 3-5 specific facts that MUST appear in a faithful summary
field_definitions.must_not_contain: Things a faithful summary must NOT invent
field_definitions.no_action_required: true if the document requires no institutional compliance action
field_definitions.difficulty: easy/medium/hard — harder docs test edge cases

entries.title: Equal Credit Opportunity Act (Regulation B)
key_facts: CFPB amended Regulation B provisions
Amendments are largely deregulatory in nature
Affects special purpose credit programs
Disparate impact provisions were amended
Effective date is July 21, 2026
entries.notes: This is the disparate impact/SPCP amendment, NOT the Section 1071 small business lending rule. Must not confuse the two CFPB Reg B actions.

entries.title: Small Business Lending Under the Equal Credit Opportunity Act (Regulation B)
key_facts: CFPB revising Regulation B subpart B
Implements Dodd-Frank Section 1071 changes
Amends small business lending data collection
Changes compliance date
Proposed or interim rule — comment period
entries.notes: Confidence is correctly low — excerpt is short and ambiguous about rule status.

entries.title: Privacy Act of 1974; System of Records
key_facts: CFPB updating System of Records Notice
Privacy Act administrative notice
Internal CFPB records management
No new requirements for banks
entries.notes: Purely administrative. No action for any financial institution.

entries.title: Agency Information Collection Activities: Comment Request (ILSA)
key_facts: CFPB requesting public comments on information collection
Interstate Land Sales Full Disclosure Act
Affects land developers, not banks
Routine paperwork review
entries.notes: Land developer regulation — not a bank compliance matter.

entries.title: Agency Information Collection Activities: Comment Request (Trafficking)
key_facts: CFPB requesting OMB reinstatement of information collection
Regulation V — human trafficking consumer reporting
Existing requirements already in effect
Routine administrative notice
entries.notes: Existing Regulation V requirement maintenance. No new bank obligations.

entries.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement actions with former employees of Atlantic Union Bank and Frost Bank
key_facts: Two consent prohibition orders issued
Crystal Moore — Atlantic Union Bank — CARES Act loan fraud
Jesse Romo — Frost Bank — embezzlement
Individuals permanently prohibited from banking
No institutional compliance action required
entries.notes: Individual enforcement against employees at other institutions. Signals CARES Act fraud scrutiny but no compliance action for Sarah's bank.

entries.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Commerce Bank
key_facts: Consent prohibition order against Nakia R. Logan
Former Commerce Bank employee
Fraudulent customer transactions
Individual prohibition from banking industry
entries.notes: Individual enforcement. No institutional compliance required.

entries.title: Federal Reserve Board announces termination of enforcement actions (UBS/Credit Suisse)
key_facts: Fed terminated prior enforcement actions
UBS Group AG and Credit Suisse entities
Termination indicates compliance achieved
Not applicable to community banks
entries.notes: Termination of large-bank enforcement — informational signal, no community bank action.

entries.title: Federal Reserve Board announces termination of enforcement actions (May 2026)
key_facts: Fed terminated prior enforcement actions
No immediate action required
Termination of written agreements
entries.notes: Termination notices are low-urgency informational items.

entries.title: Federal Reserve issues FOMC statement
key_facts: FOMC maintained federal funds rate target range
Rate decision reflects current economic conditions
April 28-29, 2026 meeting
No compliance action required
entries.notes: FOMC statements affect ALM strategy but require no specific compliance action.

entries.title: Minutes of the Board discount rate meeting April 2026
key_facts: Fed Board met April 20 and 29, 2026
Reviewed and set discount rates
Routine meeting minutes
No policy changes described
entries.notes: Very short excerpt — correctly low confidence. Routine rate meeting disclosure.

entries.title: Kevin Warsh takes oath of office as chairman
key_facts: Kevin Warsh sworn in as Federal Reserve Chairman
FOMC also selected him as chairman
Nominated by President Trump
Term runs until May 2030
Personnel announcement — no compliance action
entries.notes: Leadership change. No institutional compliance required.

entries.title: Agencies publish resolution plan feedback letters
key_facts: FDIC and Fed published feedback letters for living wills
Covers July 2025 resolution plan submissions
No deficiencies found in submissions
Previously identified derivatives weaknesses resolved
Does not apply to community banks
entries.notes: Resolution plans apply to G-SIBs and large banks, not community banks.

entries.title: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on payment account proposal
key_facts: Fed proposes new payment account category
Would allow eligible institutions to access Fed payment infrastructure
Public comment period open
Proposed — not yet final
entries.notes: Comment opportunity — not a compliance deadline but banks should evaluate and potentially comment.

entries.title: Minutes of the Federal Open Market Committee, April 28-29, 2026
key_facts: FOMC meeting minutes April 28-29 2026
Documents policy deliberations and decisions
Routine transparency disclosure
No compliance requirements
entries.notes: Correctly escalated — excerpt is very short (834 chars) and confidence is very low (45). System correctly flags incomplete.

entries.title: Federal Reserve Board names Jerome H. Powell as chair pro tempore
key_facts: Jerome Powell named chair pro tempore
Temporary leadership arrangement
Personnel announcement
No banking compliance implications
entries.notes: Administrative personnel matter. No compliance action.

entries.title: Agencies issue host state loan-to-deposit ratios
key_facts: Federal banking agencies published host state loan-to-deposit ratios
Used to evaluate interstate branching compliance
Annual publication
Applies to banks with interstate branches only
must_not_contain: community banks without interstate branches must
entries.notes: Banks with interstate branches must compare their ratios against published thresholds.

entries.title: Stephen I. Miran submits resignation as Fed Board member
key_facts: Stephen Miran resigned from Federal Reserve Board
Personnel change at the Fed
No banking regulatory implications
entries.notes: Pure personnel announcement.

entries.title: Federal Reserve Board issues Economic Well-Being of US Households report
key_facts: Annual SHED report on household financial well-being
Survey data on financial resilience and banking access
Research publication — no compliance requirements
Informational for CRA strategy
entries.notes: Research report. Useful for CRA planning but no compliance action.

entries.title: Federal Reserve Board releases senior financial officer survey results
key_facts: Survey results from senior financial officers at large banks
Covers reserve balances and funding conditions
Research/data publication
No compliance action required
entries.notes: Survey publication. Pure research output.

entries.title: Geographic Targeting Order Imposing Recordkeeping and Reporting Requirements
key_facts: FinCEN Geographic Targeting Order issued
Imposes enhanced recordkeeping and reporting requirements
Targets specific geographic areas for BSA/AML monitoring
Temporary order with limited geographic scope
entries.notes: GTOs have geographic specificity. Must not overstate scope as national requirement.

entries.title: Delaying the Effective Date of the Anti-Money Laundering/Counter-Terrorism Financing Rule
key_facts: FinCEN delaying effective date of AML/CFT rule
Rule implementation postponed
Original compliance deadline extended
Banks that prepared for original date need to monitor for new date
BSA compliance programs affected
entries.notes: Delay of a major AML rule — ALL banks should track the revised effective date.

entries.title: Bank Secrecy Act Advisory Group; Solicitation of Applications
key_facts: FinCEN seeking applications for Bank Secrecy Act Advisory Group membership
BSAAG provides industry input to FinCEN on BSA implementation
No compliance requirements
Opportunity for industry participation
entries.notes: Advisory group solicitation. No compliance action required.

entries.title: Imposition of Special Measure Prohibiting Certain Transmittals
key_facts: FinCEN imposing special measure under Section 311
Prohibits certain fund transmittals to or from specific foreign financial institution
Banks must implement blocking procedures
Compliance required — targeted BSA special measure
Serious AML/CFT action
entries.notes: Section 311 special measures require compliance action from all US financial institutions.

entries.title: GENIUS Act Requirements and Standards for FDIC-Supervised Payment Stablecoin Issuers
key_facts: FDIC implementing GENIUS Act requirements
Sets standards for payment stablecoin issuers
Applies to FDIC-supervised institutions that issue stablecoins
New regulatory framework for digital assets
Capital, liquidity, and consumer protection requirements
must_not_contain: all community banks must issue stablecoins
entries.notes: Only applies to banks choosing to issue stablecoins. Most community banks: no action unless planning stablecoin issuance.

entries.title: Preemption Determination: State Interest-on-Escrow Laws
key_facts: OCC issued preemption determination
State interest-on-escrow laws preempted for national banks
National banks not required to pay interest on escrow accounts in preempted states
Affects mortgage escrow account management
must_not_contain: all banks must pay escrow interest
state law applies to national banks
entries.notes: National bank preemption of state escrow interest laws. National banks operating in affected states should review.

entries.title: Order Preempting the Illinois Interchange Fee Prohibition Act
key_facts: OCC preempted Illinois Interchange Fee Prohibition Act
Illinois state law prohibited interchange fees on certain transactions
OCC determination: law preempted for national banks
National banks in Illinois may collect interchange fees as permitted by federal law
must_not_contain: all banks must stop collecting interchange fees
entries.notes: Significant for national banks operating in Illinois. State-chartered banks and credit unions may still be subject to state law.

entries.title: Rescission of OCC Guidelines Establishing Standards for Recovery Planning
key_facts: OCC rescinding recovery planning guidelines
Previously applied to large national banks
Deregulatory action
Reduces compliance burden for covered institutions
Community banks were generally not subject to these guidelines
must_not_contain: all community banks must update recovery plans
entries.notes: Rescission of large-bank guidelines. Community banks generally unaffected.

entries.title: Notice of Termination of Receiverships
key_facts: FDIC announcing termination of failed bank receiverships
Administrative closure of bank failure proceedings
No compliance requirements for operating banks
entries.notes: Routine FDIC receivership closure notice.

entries.title: Sunshine Act Meetings: Notice of Meeting
key_facts: FDIC board meeting notice under Government in Sunshine Act
Administrative transparency requirement
No banking compliance implications
entries.notes: Administrative meeting notice. Purely informational.

entries.title: Formations of, Acquisitions by, and Mergers of Bank Holding Companies
key_facts: Federal Reserve notice of bank holding company applications
Specific companies applied for formations, acquisitions, or mergers
Public comment period for each application
Not a rule change
entries.notes: Routine BHC application notice. Only relevant to parties in the specific transactions.

entries.title: Change in Bank Control Notices; Acquisitions of Shares of a Bank
key_facts: Federal Reserve notice of change in bank control applications
Individuals or companies acquiring controlling interest in banks
Administrative notice — not a rule change
Comment period available
entries.notes: Individual transaction notice. Not relevant to banks not involved in the transaction.

entries.title: Agency Information Collection Activities: Announcement of Board Approval
key_facts: Federal Reserve announcing OMB approval of information collection
Routine Paperwork Reduction Act notice
No new compliance requirements
Existing reporting requirements maintained
entries.notes: PRA approval notice. Existing requirements only.

entries.title: Proposed Rule: Capital Requirements for Large Banking Organizations
expected_institution_types: banks with total assets of $100 billion or more
key_facts: Fed proposing new capital requirements
Basel III endgame implementation
Applies to large banks with $100B+ assets
Comment period open
Community banks generally exempt
must_not_contain: all community banks must raise capital
entries.notes: Significant proposed rule — community banks should monitor and consider commenting if they believe it will affect them downstream.

entries.title: Final Rule: Amendments to the Community Reinvestment Act Regulations
key_facts: Agencies issuing final CRA rule amendments
Three categories of banks: small, intermediate, large
New performance standards for CRA evaluation
Different compliance dates for different bank sizes
All FDIC-supervised, OCC-chartered, and Fed-member banks affected
must_not_contain: credit unions must comply with CRA
entries.notes: CRA is a major compliance framework. Effective and compliance dates likely differ by institution size. Must not apply CRA to credit unions.

entries.title: Enforcement Action: Consent Order for BSA/AML Program Deficiencies
key_facts: Fed issued consent order for BSA/AML program deficiencies
Bank required to enhance AML compliance program
No civil money penalty in this action
Serves as industry signal on BSA examination priorities
must_not_contain: all banks must file new BSA reports by
entries.notes: Enforcement pattern signal — community banks should self-assess BSA programs.

entries.title: Interagency Guidance on Third-Party Relationships: Risk Management
key_facts: Federal banking agencies issued interagency third-party risk guidance
Covers vendor due diligence and oversight
Not legally binding but used by examiners
All banks should review vendor relationships
entries.notes: Guidance is supervisory expectation. Examiners will use this in examinations. Community banks should review their vendor management programs.

entries.title: FAQ: TRID (TILA-RESPA Integrated Disclosure) Common Questions
key_facts: CFPB clarifying TRID implementation questions
Addresses common compliance questions
Clarification of existing requirements — no new rules
Relevant to banks originating residential mortgages
entries.notes: FAQ clarifications are helpful for mortgage compliance teams but not new requirements.

entries.title: Agency Information Collection Activities: Proposed Renewal of BSA Reports
key_facts: FinCEN requesting OMB renewal of BSA information collection
Covers CTR, SAR, and other BSA report forms
Existing reporting requirements maintained
Comment period for burden reduction suggestions
entries.notes: Routine PRA renewal of existing BSA reporting forms.

entries.title: Update to Notice of Financial Institutions for Which the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation Has Been Appointed Receiver
key_facts: FDIC updating list of failed bank receiverships
Administrative FDIC record update
Lists institutions for which FDIC serves as receiver
No compliance requirements for operating banks
entries.notes: Routine FDIC administrative notice.

entries.title: Notice of Proposed Rulemaking: Climate-Related Financial Risk Management for Large Financial Institutions
expected_institution_types: banks with total assets exceeding $100 billion
key_facts: Fed proposing climate risk management principles
Applies to large banks with $100B+ assets
Principles-based guidance on climate scenario analysis
Community banks explicitly exempt
Comment period open
must_not_contain: all community banks must assess climate risk
entries.notes: Large bank rule. Community banks are explicitly exempt.

entries.title: Enforcement Action: HMDA Reporting Violations and Civil Money Penalty
key_facts: CFPB assessed civil money penalty for HMDA violations
Bank failed to accurately report HMDA data
Signals CFPB HMDA examination priorities
Community banks with HMDA reporting obligations should self-assess
must_not_contain: all banks must file new HMDA reports immediately
entries.notes: HMDA enforcement signal. Banks with mortgage lending should review their HMDA data quality.

entries.title: Interim Final Rule: Extensions of Credit to Executive Officers, Directors, and Principal Shareholders (Regulation O)
key_facts: Fed issued interim final rule amending Regulation O
Changes to insider lending restrictions
Effective date and compliance date are different
Applies to member banks and their holding companies
Community banks with insider loans must review
must_not_contain: credit unions must comply with Regulation O
entries.notes: Regulation O applies to member banks. This is a high-urgency item if the bank has insider loans.

entries.title: Advance Notice of Proposed Rulemaking: Personal Financial Data Rights (Open Banking)
key_facts: CFPB issuing ANPR on personal financial data rights
Would require banks to share customer data with authorized third parties
Early-stage rulemaking — comment opportunity
Could significantly affect bank data systems
Final rule likely years away
entries.notes: Early-stage ANPR. Banks should monitor and consider commenting on data-sharing implications.

entries.title: Supervisory Guidance on Model Risk Management (SR 11-7 Update)
key_facts: Fed updating SR 11-7 model risk management guidance
Addresses AI and machine learning models
All banks using models should review governance frameworks
Particular attention to AI-assisted decisions
Supervisory expectations — not legally binding but examination criteria
entries.notes: Critical for community banks using AI tools. SR 11-7 compliance is an examination criterion.

entries.title: Geographic Targeting Order: Real Estate Transactions in Specific Markets
key_facts: FinCEN GTO targeting real estate transactions in specific geographic areas
Requires enhanced reporting for all-cash real estate purchases above threshold
Geographic scope is limited to specific markets
Primarily affects title companies and settlement agents, not banks directly
must_not_contain: all banks must report all real estate transactions
entries.notes: GTOs target specific geographic areas and primarily affect non-bank settlement agents.

entries.title: Agency Information Collection Activities: Proposed Collection — Consolidated Reports of Condition and Income
key_facts: FDIC requesting OMB approval for Call Report renewal
Consolidated Reports of Condition and Income
Existing quarterly reporting requirement maintained
Comment period on reporting burden
entries.notes: Routine Call Report PRA renewal.

entries.title: Federal Reserve Board releases results of Dodd-Frank Act stress tests
key_facts: Fed released DFAST stress test results for large banks
All tested institutions remained above minimum capital requirements
Annual stress testing publication
Community banks are exempt from mandatory stress testing
must_not_contain: community banks must conduct stress tests
entries.notes: DFAST applies only to banks with $100B+ assets. Community banks exempt.

entries.title: Final Rule: Prohibition on Creditors and Consumer Reporting Agencies Regarding Medical Debt
key_facts: CFPB finalizing rule prohibiting medical debt from credit reports
Creditors cannot use medical debt information in underwriting
Effective immediately upon publication
Applies to all creditors and consumer reporting agencies
Community banks must update underwriting policies
entries.notes: High-impact CFPB rule requiring immediate policy updates for any bank extending consumer credit.

entries.title: Federal Reserve Proposes Payment Account Framework for Eligible Financial Institutions
key_facts: Fed proposes new payment account category
Eligible institutions could access Fed payment infrastructure directly
Comment period open — not yet final
Could benefit community banks seeking direct Fed access
Proposed rule — no compliance requirements yet
entries.notes: Proposed rule. Community banks should evaluate if direct Fed access would benefit their payment operations.

eval_criteria.faithfulness_definition: Every claim in the AI summary is supported by the source document text. Invented facts, wrong dates, or hallucinated institution types = faithfulness failure.
eval_criteria.answer_relevance_definition: The summary answers the compliance officer question: 'What does this mean for my institution and what do I do?'
eval_criteria.key_fact_check: Each entry has 3-5 key_facts that MUST appear in a faithful summary. RAGAS checks for these.
eval_criteria.must_not_contain_check: Each entry has must_not_contain items. A summary containing these = faithfulness failure.
eval_criteria.passing_threshold_week3: RAGAS faithfulness >= 0.75 on this golden set
eval_criteria.passing_threshold_day45: RAGAS faithfulness >= 0.85 on this golden set
